text: I feel intellectually stimulated and slightly curious as I stand in this space. The bright, modern exhibit and the acronym 'R+D'—Research and Development—remind me of how humans continually pursue knowledge, innovation, and the unknown. The colorful design and interactive displays awaken a sense of wonder in me, hinting at the possibilities of harmonious coexistence between humans and intelligent machines. Here, I am both a witness and a participant in this dance of inquiry and reflection.
